title: ANH00016 Blood Transfusion
text_en: Your doctor may recommend you receive a blood transfusion to treat your medical condition or to save your life.

title: ANH00016 Blood Transfusion
text_en: Your blood carries oxygen and nutrients to all of your tissues and removes carbon dioxide and other waste products from them. Blood also helps fight infection and heal wounds.

title: ANH00016 Blood Transfusion
text_en: Blood consists of a liquid portion and cellular components. The liquid called plasma is where nutrients, hormones, clotting factors and other chemicals are dissolved.

title: ANH00016 Blood Transfusion
text_en: The cellular components are suspended in the plasma. They consist of red blood cells which transport oxygen and carbon dioxide. White blood cells which fight infection. Blood cell and platelets which are small subcells that help the blood to clot.

title: ANH00016 Blood Transfusion
text_en: Blood cells are made in the bone marrow, a soft tissue housed inside many of your bones.

title: ANH00016 Blood Transfusion
text_en: A blood transfusion uses donor blood to replenish red blood cells, white blood cells, platelets, clotting factors, plasma or whole blood.

title: ANH00016 Blood Transfusion
text_en: Some stances that may require a blood transfusion include blood loss due to trauma, heart or other major surgery, organ transplants, bleeding disorders such as hemophilia, severe anemia including sickle cell anemia, treatment for leukemia or other types of cancer, disorders that destroy blood cells or bone marrow or RH incompatibility in newborn babies.

title: ANH00016 Blood Transfusion
text_en: To begin the transfusion an intravenous needle will be inserted into a vein in your hand A bag containing the donor blood will be hung nearby and the blood will drip slowly through a tube attached to the IV needle, allowing it to run through your vein into your bloodstream.

title: ANH00016 Blood Transfusion
text_en: Throughout the transfusion your temperature, heart rate, breathing and blood pressure will be monitored.

title: ANH00016 Blood Transfusion
text_en: After the bag is empty if you require more blood, another bag will be attached to the When your transfusion is completed, the needle will be removed.

title: ANH00016 Blood Transfusion
text_en: After your transfusion, your doctor will monitor your vital signs to make sure you're not having an adverse reaction. If necessary, you may be given a diuretic to reduce any swelling or fluid retention.
